# kcp-dashboard

> Live terminal dashboard for KCP (Knowledge Context Protocol) usage statistics.
> Built with Bubble Tea + Lip Gloss. Auto-refreshes every 2 seconds.

Shows token savings, guidance quality, session profiles, filtered retry rates,
and per-command bar charts across the KCP toolchain. The observability layer
for kcp-commands + kcp-memory in one TUI.

Part of the [KCP ecosystem](https://github.com/Cantara/knowledge-context-protocol).
Apache-2.0. Go.

## Structured Navigation (for AI agents)

This repository ships a KCP v0.14 manifest:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cantara/kcp-dashboard/main/knowledge.yaml

Signing key (delegated to Cantara org): https://wiki.cantara.no/.well-known/kcp-signing-key.pub

## Panels

- **Overview** — kcp-commands stats, kcp-memory stats, active projects
- **Guidance Effects** — manifest coverage bar chart, filtered retry rate, help-followup rate, quality alerts
- **Session Profile** — session count, avg turns, size histogram
- **Commands Guided** — top 10 most-guided commands with inject counts

## Install

```bash
go install github.com/Cantara/kcp-dashboard@latest
kcp-dashboard
```

## Related

- [kcp-commands](https://github.com/Cantara/kcp-commands) — the hook that generates the data
- [kcp-memory](https://github.com/Cantara/kcp-memory) — episodic memory hub
- [knowledge-context-protocol](https://github.com/Cantara/knowledge-context-protocol) — KCP spec
